title: Savory Crunchy Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A garlicky and crunchy Algerian dish featuring butter and lacquer glaze, perfect for a date night, and jain friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lacquer glaze, garlic, salt, black pepper, and algerian spice mix.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Dot the top of the chicken with the unsalted butter.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
While the chicken is baking, heat the remaining marinade in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the dates to the saucepan and cook until they are caramelized and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the chicken from the oven and brush it with the date and lacquer glaze sauce.
Return the chicken to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
